taxonomy: Peckia macrophylla is a species of fly in the family Calliphoridae. It is a type of blow fly that belongs to the genus Peckia. Peckia macrophylla is often classified under the order Diptera, which includes all true flies. This species is known for its distinctive physical characteristics and behavior. The classification of Peckia macrophylla is a key aspect of understanding its biology and ecological role.
